title: Reborn as a Cat
overview: Miaomiao gets harassed by debt collectors and meets a deity with a challenge for her.

title: Lu Has a Cat
overview: According to office gossip Mr. Lu got a cat... Meanwhile Miaomiao gets a visit from a deity.

title: Miaomiao's Past and Present
overview: Mr. Lu learns more about Miaomiao's past from a coworker and it's difficult to sleep in this new arrangement.

title: A Thousand
overview: After a rough night on the couch Mr. Lu accidentally leaves his flash drive at home, can Miaomiao get it to the office on time...as a cat?

title: The End and the Beginning
overview: Miaomiao is stuck in Mr. Lu's office as a cat and his rivals don't play nice.

title: The Mall Trouble
overview: Miaomiao wants to go for a walk, but Mr. Lu's grandfather wants him to go on a blind date so it's a game of hide and seek with more feline time.

title: The Dark Storm
overview: Mr. Lu deals with a troublesome employee while Miaomiao adjusts to being his guest.

title: The Seperation Crisis
overview: Human Miaomiao goes for a walk and is surprised to find she understands cats, Supervisor Xia follows his suspicions.

title: The New Beginning
overview: With Xia joining team Miaomiao, Lu moves them all to his parent's house where jealousy could put her in danger again.

title: Kidnapping
overview: Miaomiao has been captured by the gang that has been chasing her, how will she regain her freedom?

title: The Secret
overview: Miaomiao recovers from the incident with Peng Fei, Xia meets someone new and Mr. Lu comes to a realization.

title: The Cat's Wish
overview: Miaomiao wakes, but is it really her?

title: Observations in the Dark
overview: Lu and Miaomiao get help to find the way forward.

title: I Want to Be Your Family
overview: Peng Fei visits Miaomiao and things progress with Mr. Lu.

title: Letters of Separation
overview: Lu is confronted with an arranged marriage from his grandfather, is Miaomiao's fate sealed?

title: The Return
overview: The cat spirit is revealed, will past wounds doom them both?

title: The Shocking
overview: While Mr. Lu and Miaomiao try to understand the motives behind her bargain Ms. Ning is hospitalized.

title: Back to the Beginning
overview: Obsession and jealousy threaten Miaomiao's remaining time with Lu, can she reveal her feelings before fate tears them apart?

title: Change Everything
overview: What destiny awaits Miaomiao after her sacrifice?

title: Life in the Workplace
overview: Miaomiao has returned to the beginning of her journey, can the knowledge she possesses keep everyone safe?

title: The Sweet Experience
overview: Miaomiao adjusts to her new life, but is she the only one that remembers what happened?

title: Their Thoughts
overview: Miaomiao receives guidance from her new roommates. Mr. Lu starts to suspect that Miaomiao has also retained her memories.

title: The Potential Danger
overview: After the collision Lu, Miaomiao and the suspended Directors of Destiny discuss the calamity that awaits.

title: Grandfather's Visit
overview: Miaomiao visits the orphanage where she was raised and meets Lu's family.

title: The Trick of Life
overview: Chengze's younger brother comes to stay with him temporarily, can Miaomiao's big sister energy save the first evening?

title: The Fate of the Judge
overview: Miaomiao works to win over Chengze's younger brother, who does a Director of Destiny answer to when they break the rules?

title: The Crisis
overview: Miaomiao and Chengze spend the day at the park with Chenglin, can the medicine keep his illness at bay?
